requirement_topic.en: Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) — SASO EMC Technical Regulation
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容性（EMC）——SASO电磁兼容技术法规
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容性（EMC）——SASO電磁相容技術法規

summary.en: Saudi Arabia has issued an EMC technical regulation under SASO that requires electrical and electronic products, including industrial energy storage equipment, to meet electromagnetic compatibility requirements before market placement. Products regulated under the SASO EMC technical regulation must obtain a SABER PCoC demonstrating compliance with the applicable IEC EMC standards. For BESS power conversion systems, the relevant IEC standards typically include IEC 61000-6-2 (Immunity for Industrial Environments) and IEC 61000-6-4 (Emission Standard for Industrial Environments). EMC compliance testing must be conducted by a SASO-approved conformity assessment body.
summary.zh: 沙特阿拉伯在SASO框架下颁布了电磁兼容技术法规，要求包括工业储能设备在内的电气电子产品在进入市场前满足电磁兼容要求。受SASO EMC技术法规约束的产品，须通过SABER平台取得证明符合适用IEC EMC标准的PCoC。对于BESS储能变流器系统，相关IEC标准通常包括IEC 61000-6-2（工业环境抗扰度）和IEC 61000-6-4（工业环境发射标准）。EMC合规测试须由SASO认可的合格评定机构进行。
summary.zht: 沙特阿拉伯在SASO框架下頒布了電磁相容技術法規，要求包括工業儲能設備在內的電氣電子產品在進入市場前滿足電磁相容要求。受SASO EMC技術法規約束的產品，須通過SABER平台取得證明符合適用IEC EMC標準的PCoC。對於BESS儲能變流器系統，相關IEC標準通常包括IEC 61000-6-2（工業環境抗擾度）和IEC 61000-6-4（工業環境發射標準）。EMC合規測試須由SASO認可的合格評定機構進行。

standards_or_laws: SASO EMC Technical Regulation — mandatory EMC requirement for electrical and electronic products placed on the Saudi market
IEC 61000-6-2:2016 — Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) — Generic Standards — Immunity Standard for Industrial Environments
IEC 61000-6-4:2018 — Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) — Generic Standards — Emission Standard for Industrial Environments
SASO SABER platform — PCoC required for regulated EMC products

summary.en: China's EMC requirements for industrial electrical equipment are set under GB/T 17626 series (Electromagnetic Compatibility Testing and Measurement Techniques) and GB/T 17799 series (Generic EMC Standards), which largely align with the IEC 61000 series. BESS power conversion systems in China must comply with GB/T 17799-2 (Immunity for Industrial Environments) and GB/T 17799-4 (Emission Standard for Industrial Environments) as part of CCC (China Compulsory Certification) or voluntary certification. While technically aligned with IEC standards, Chinese GB/T EMC test reports are not accepted by SASO as substitutes for SABER PCoC.
summary.zh: 中国工业电气设备的EMC要求由GB/T 17626系列（电磁兼容试验和测量技术）和GB/T 17799系列（通用EMC标准）规定，与IEC 61000系列基本对应。中国储能变流器须符合GB/T 17799-2（工业环境抗扰度）和GB/T 17799-4（工业环境发射标准），作为CCC（中国强制认证）或自愿认证的组成部分。尽管在技术上与IEC标准一致，但中国GB/T EMC测试报告不被SASO接受为SABER PCoC的替代依据。
summary.zht: 中國工業電氣設備的EMC要求由GB/T 17626系列（電磁相容試驗和測量技術）和GB/T 17799系列（通用EMC標準）規定，與IEC 61000系列基本對應。中國儲能變流器須符合GB/T 17799-2（工業環境抗擾度）和GB/T 17799-4（工業環境發射標準），作為CCC（中國強制認證）或自願認證的組成部分。儘管在技術上與IEC標準一致，但中國GB/T EMC測試報告不被SASO接受為SABER PCoC的替代依據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 17799-2-2003 — 电磁兼容 通用标准 工业环境中的抗扰度试验 (EMC Generic Standard — Immunity for Industrial Environments)
GB/T 17799-4-2012 — 电磁兼容 通用标准 工业环境中的发射 (EMC Generic Standard — Emission in Industrial Environments)
GB/T 17626 series — 电磁兼容 试验和测量技术 (EMC Testing and Measurement Techniques)

gap.en: Partial technical alignment, administrative gap: Chinese GB/T 17799 EMC standards technically align with IEC 61000-6-2 / 61000-6-4. However, Chinese GB/T EMC test reports and CCC certificates are not accepted by SASO in lieu of a SABER PCoC. BESS exporters must have EMC testing conducted to IEC 61000-6-2 / 61000-6-4 by a SASO-approved conformity assessment body and must register the product on SABER. If the Chinese manufacturer holds IEC 61000-6-2 / 61000-6-4 test reports from a CNAS-accredited laboratory, it should verify with the SASO-approved body whether a test report cross-recognition or witness-test pathway exists to avoid duplicating all testing. Verify current SASO EMC technical regulation scope and product classification with SASO before committing to a test programme.
gap.zh: 技术上部分对应，存在行政差距：中国GB/T 17799 EMC标准在技术上与IEC 61000-6-2 / 61000-6-4对应。但中国GB/T EMC测试报告和CCC证书不被SASO接受以替代SABER PCoC。BESS出口商须由SASO认可的合格评定机构依据IEC 61000-6-2 / 61000-6-4进行EMC测试，并在SABER平台注册产品。若中国制造商持有CNAS认可实验室的IEC 61000-6-2 / 61000-6-4测试报告，应向SASO认可机构核实是否存在测试报告互认或见证测试路径，以避免重复全部测试。请在确定测试方案前向SASO核实现行EMC技术法规范围及产品分类。
gap.zht: 技術上部分對應，存在行政差距：中國GB/T 17799 EMC標準在技術上與IEC 61000-6-2 / 61000-6-4對應。但中國GB/T EMC測試報告和CCC證書不被SASO接受以替代SABER PCoC。BESS出口商須由SASO認可的合格評定機構依據IEC 61000-6-2 / 61000-6-4進行EMC測試，並在SABER平台註冊產品。若中國製造商持有CNAS認可實驗室的IEC 61000-6-2 / 61000-6-4測試報告，應向SASO認可機構核實是否存在測試報告互認或見證測試路徑，以避免重複全部測試。請在確定測試方案前向SASO核實現行EMC技術法規範圍及產品分類。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SASO EMC technical regulation requires SABER PCoC for regulated electrical products placed on the Saudi market
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for products within CCC scope; GB/T 17799 EMC compliance mandatory for industrial electrical equipment sold in China

source.publisher: SASO — Saudi Standards, Metrology and Quality Organization (SABER Platform)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 17799 EMC certifications and CCC certificates are not accepted by SASO as substitutes for a SABER PCoC. BESS exporters should verify current SASO EMC technical regulation applicability and product classification on the SABER platform, and engage a SASO-approved conformity assessment body for IEC 61000-6-2 / 61000-6-4 testing. Explore whether existing IEC test reports from a CNAS lab may be leveraged under any cross-recognition pathway before committing to full re-testing.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 17799 EMC认证及CCC证书不被SASO接受为SABER PCoC的替代依据。BESS出口商应在SABER平台核实当前SASO EMC技术法规的适用性和产品分类，并聘请SASO认可的合格评定机构进行IEC 61000-6-2 / 61000-6-4测试。在确定全面重新测试方案前，探讨现有CNAS实验室IEC测试报告是否可在任何互认途径下加以利用。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 17799 EMC認證及CCC證書不被SASO接受為SABER PCoC的替代依據。BESS出口商應在SABER平台核實當前SASO EMC技術法規的適用性和產品分類，並聘請SASO認可的合格評定機構進行IEC 61000-6-2 / 61000-6-4測試。在確定全面重新測試方案前，探討現有CNAS實驗室IEC測試報告是否可在任何互認途徑下加以利用。
